summary: Adjusted the create-task rule so the bootstrap root task no longer disqualifies it, but runtime acceptance still returns 维护成本台账 first on a fresh in-progress project because the cost-maintenance rule has higher priority and also matches. The remaining blocker is now recommendation priority/mutual-exclusion semantics.

notes: The original bootstrap-vs-rule conflict is closed.
A new governance conflict remains between create-task and update-cost recommendation ordering/overlap.
Further progress now requires an explicit product decision on rule priority or mutual exclusion.

next_step: Stop the chain and open a governance batch to choose whether create-task should outrank update-cost on bootstrap-only projects, or whether one of the two rules should gain an exclusion condition.
